name: Dashboard
description: Experience-layer read model: keeps a live per-tenant operations board (latest OEE per machine and a recent alert feed) current by consuming events from any module.
author: FactoryOS

api.description: A tenant's live operations board in one call: latest OEE per machine and the recent alert feed (newest first); optional level and/or kind filters narrow the feed while the critical count stays a whole-board headline.
A tenant's board headline: machines tracked, machines below target, recent alerts, critical alerts and a per-kind alert breakdown (ordered by count descending).
